> spawn-sync@1.0.15 postinstall /workspace/node_modules/spawn-sync

> rollup --config --silent

Running mocha tests...

> terser@5.46.1 test:mocha /workspace
> mocha test/mocha



  annotations
    #__PURE__
      ✔ Should add a 'pure' annotation to the AST node
    #__INLINE__
      ✔ Adds an annotation
    #__NOINLINE__
      ✔ Adds an annotation

  arguments
    ✔ Should known that arguments in functions are local scoped
    ✔ Should recognize when a function uses arguments
    ✔ Should parse a function containing default assignment correctly
    ✔ Should parse a function containing default assignments in destructuring correctly
    ✔ Should parse a function containing default assignments in complex destructuring correctly
    ✔ Should parse spread correctly

  Arrow functions
    - Should not accept spread tokens on non-last parameters or without arguments parentheses
    ✔ Should not accept holes in object binding patterns, while still allowing a trailing elision
    ✔ Should not accept newlines before arrow token
    ✔ Should not accept arrow functions in the middle or end of an expression
    ✔ Should parse a function containing default assignment correctly
    ✔ Should parse a function containing default assignments in destructuring correctly
    ✔ Should parse a function containing default assignments in complex destructuring correctly
    ✔ Should parse spread correctly
    ✔ Should handle arrow function with bind
    ✔ Should handle return of arrow function assignment

  builtins
    ✔ Should not mangle builtins

  Class
    ✔ Should not accept spread on non-last parameters in methods
    ✔ Should return the correct token for class methods
    ✔ should work properly with class properties

    1) Should handle literal string as source map input

    ✔ Should not append source map to output when not using --source-map url=inline (97ms)

      ✔ Should handle preamble without shebang correctly

    ✔ Should generate similar trees for destructuring in left hand side expressions, definitions, functions and arrow functions

    ✔ Should allow tokenizer to store directives state
    ✔ Should know which strings are directive and which ones are not

    ✔ Should test code for at least throwing syntax error when incomplete

    ✔ Should set uses_with for scopes involving With statements

    ✔ Should be able to compress its expression

    ✔ Should be able to drop undefined after yield if necessary with compression
